textPlain: I look forward to another of Sam's brilliant creations. It's a shame Overtone was abandoned as I think Clojure is the perfect language for this type of project.

This is a huge achievement, props to Sam!SuperCollider is great for audio / music work, but it was always difficult to distribute work created in it.As a prototyper I use the WebAudio API most of the time, as if you send someone a .app, they won't open it, but if you send them a link they have no excuse.
